final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] obf_A,
    input [7:0] B,
    input [1:0] opcode,
    output reg [7:0] result
);always @(*) begin
    case (opcode)
        2'b00: result = obf_A + B; // addition
        2'b01: result = obf_A - B; // subtraction
        2'b10: result = obf_A * B; // multiplication
        2'b11: begin // division
            if (B == 0) begin
                result = 8'hFF; // division by zero error
            end else begin
                result = obf_A / B;
            end
        end
    endcase
end

endmodule
